market_pulse: Weekend peak activity across Strip venues with strong DJ lineup announcements; OMNIA, LIV Beach, and Hakkasan dominating social engagement with high-profile talent.

weekend_readiness.label: HIGH
factors: LIV Beach: Tiesto (SAT 6/22), Kromi (SUN 6/23) confirmed headline
OMNIA: Steve Aoki (6/19), DJ Paul Yd (6/20), Yoyo Lie (6/21)
Hakkasan: Strong R&Bae programming + DJ Drama (6/20)
Zouk: Ian Asher (6/26), James Hype (6/27) lined up
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: CAPITALIZE: LIV Beach has premium Friday-Sunday lineup with Tiesto + Kromi. Push bottle service bundles and VIP table inventory NOW. Competitors (OMNIA, XS, Zouk) all well-staffed. Deploy content team to capture Tiesto/Kromi story highlights before end-of-day Sunday.

content_gaps.description: Competitors using high-energy countdown audio and hype transitions in TikTok reels; LIV Beach content shows more lifestyle/aesthetic focus
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create 3-5 countdown reels for Tiesto/Kromi weekender; use trending house remixes and high-energy drops in 15-sec clips

content_gaps.description: No major influencer mentions detected in LIV social this week vs. competitors' active creator partnerships (Cardi B afterparty, celebrity sightings)
content_gaps.suggested_action: Identify micro-influencers (50k-500k followers) attending Tiesto/Kromi nights; seed free bottle service + story tags for Saturday

content_gaps.description: Competitors actively reposting attendee content; LIV Beach feed is primarily official branded content (DJs, event promos)
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch #LiveAtLIV weekend hashtag campaign; repost 2-3 attendee stories per day to Stories (Saturday-Sunday)

Kromi confirmed Sunday 6/23 at LIV Beach; rising house/tech house artist with strong underground following

liv_outreach_targets.reason: Already booked for Friday 6/19 — amplify her appearance in LIV stories and IG feed
